summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently against hydrated preflight state at main 9a0aefb73feb776fed263a15ba6190746ad74012. The deterministic validator requires #93499 to be quarantined as security-sensitive with an exact-ref route_security action. The remaining useful focused or maintainer-owned PRs stay open for normal maintainer review because merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked and low-signal closeout is disabled.

actions.reason: Keep open as related active Discord status-reaction work; maintainer/assignee review should decide whether this layer is the right canonical fix.
Keep open as related focused gateway reset work; it is not low-signal, duplicate, abandoned, or safely closable in this job.
Keep open as related narrow CJK IME replacement work; proof failure and technical correctness review block any stronger action.
Route #93499 to central OpenClaw security handling; do not merge, close, comment on, label, or create a fix PR for this security-sensitive PR in ProjectClownfish.
